findings.summary: Auto component MSMEs in Chennai face margin pressure from raw-material volatility but order pipelines remain stable.
findings.source_title: Auto Component Suppliers Navigate Cost Pressures
findings.raw_snippet: Tier-2 suppliers reported margin compression despite stable order books from major OEMs.

findings.summary: No promoter-level criminal or fraud proceedings found against Vertex Auto Forgings Pvt Ltd in MCA and court index checks.
findings.raw_snippet: No adverse MCA fraud flags or strike-off actions located for Vertex Auto Forgings Pvt Ltd.
